'''âf-w-w-s''' ('''kafawesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hackle|hackle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-w-w-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hackle|hackle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-w-w-s
|-
! Lemma
| kafawesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifawesoko|thifawesoko]] || [[word:jifawesoko|jifawesoko]] || [[word:shifawesoko|shifawesoko]] || [[word:kifawesoko|kifawesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufawesoko|thuthufawesoko]] || [[word:jujufawesoko|jujufawesoko]] || [[word:shushufawesoko|shushufawesoko]] || [[word:kukufawesoko|kukufawesoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofawesoko|thofawesoko]] || [[word:jofawesoko|jofawesoko]] || [[word:shofawesoko|shofawesoko]] || [[word:kofawesoko|kofawesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfawesoko|thĂŠfawesoko]] || [[word:jĂŠfawesoko|jĂŠfawesoko]] || [[word:shĂŠfawesoko|shĂŠfawesoko]] || [[word:kĂŠfawesoko|kĂŠfawesoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafawesoko|thafawesoko]] || [[word:jafawesoko|jafawesoko]] || [[word:shafawesoko|shafawesoko]] || [[word:kafawesoko|kafawesoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
